zh.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers是Reginald de Ferrers of Bere的兒子，於1225年出生在英國戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通。他於1256年之前與Matilda de Champernoun在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1280年享年55歲，埋葬在英國戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers是Reginald de Ferrers of Bere的儿子，于1225年出生在英国戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通。他于1256年之前与Matilda de Champernoun在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1280年享年55岁，埋葬在英国戴文貝 費雷斯 煙雨 貝 阿爾斯通。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers was born in 1225, in Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England as the son of Reginald de Ferrers of Bere. He married Matilda de Champernoun before 1256, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1280, at the age of 55, and was buried in Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers est né en 1225, à Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Angleterre, fils de Reginald de Ferrers of Bere. Il a épousé Matilda de Champernoun avant 1256, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1280, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers è nato il nel 1225 nel Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, England come figlio di Reginald de Ferrers of Bere. Lui sposato Matilda de Champernoun prima del 1256, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrersは1225年にイギリスデボンバー フエレルズ ウィス バー アルストンでReginald de Ferrers of Bereの息子として生まれた。1256年以前にイギリスイギリスでMatilda de Champernounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1280年に55歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバー フエレルズ ウィス バー アルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers(은)는 1225년 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴에서 Reginald de Ferrers of Bere의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1256년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Matilda de Champernoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1280년 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers nasceu em 1225, em Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Inglaterra filho de Reginald de Ferrers of Bere. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Champernoun antes 1256, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1280, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devonshir: бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия
ru.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers родился в 1225 г. в местности бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия. Его отца звали Reginald de Ferrers of Bere. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Champernoun перед 1256 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1280 г. в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности бир фиррирс вит бир алстон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William IV De Ferrers nació en 1225, en Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Inglaterra como hijo de Reginald de Ferrers of Bere. Se casó con Matilda de Champernoun antes de 1256, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1280, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, Inglaterra.
